change_summary: Endpoint to invalidate all active sessions for an account, including refresh tokens, with an audit entry.
critical_invariants: Revocation invalidates both access and refresh tokens for the account.
A revoked session can never be resumed; subsequent requests re-authenticate.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Invalidate all active sessions for an account (account-security).
Implemented: revocation service clears access + refresh tokens and writes an audit row; tests cover refresh-token invalidation after a reviewer finding.
Not implemented: per-device revocation UI tracked by AUTH-107
repo_gates: cd backend && npm run build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - tsc clean
cd backend && npm test -- sessionRevocation [result=pass; attribution=clean] - 8 passed
prior_findings: AUTH-106-R1-1 (high): revocation did not invalidate refresh tokens — resolved; refresh tokens now cleared and asserted by test.

self_review_cycles.findings: all token types cleared atomically; partial-failure rolls back
revoked sessions rejected; concurrent-login race covered by test
audit row on every revoke; bounded fan-out per account
R1 high finding resolved; awaiting final review sign-off
